scope.title: Scope
scope.description: Execute policy on request (HEAD) phase, response (HEAD) phase, request_content (includes payload) phase, response content (includes payload) phase.

invocationType.title: Invocation Type
invocationType.description:
RequestResponse (default) – Invoke the function synchronously. Keep the connection open until the function returns a response or times out. The API response includes the function response and additional data.
Event – Invoke the function asynchronously. Send events that fail multiple times to the function's dead-letter queue (if one is configured). The API response only includes a status code.
DryRun – Validate parameter values and verify that the user or role has permission to invoke the function.

qualifier.title: Qualifier
qualifier.description: Specify a version or alias to invoke a published version of the function.

logType.title: Log Type
logType.description: Set to Tail to include the execution log in the response. Applies to synchronously invoked functions only.

roleArn.title: Assume Role ARN
roleArn.description: The arn of the role to be assumed. This is used when authentication is relying on the AWS Security Token Service (STS) to assume a Role and create temporary, short-lived sessions to use for authentication.

roleSessionName.title: Role Session Name
roleSessionName.description: An identifier for the assumed role session (Only used when authentication is based on AWS Security Token Service (STS)

sendToConsumer.title: Send lambda function result to consumer
sendToConsumer.description: Check this option if you want to send the response of the lambda to the initial consumer without going to the final upstream (endpoints) selected by the gateway.

connectionTimeoutMs.title: Connection Timeout (ms)
connectionTimeoutMs.description: The amount of time to wait (in milliseconds) when initially establishing a connection before giving up. If not set, the default value of the AWS SDK is used (2000ms).

readTimeoutMs.title: Read Timeout (ms)
readTimeoutMs.description: The amount of time to wait (in milliseconds) for data to be transferred over an established connection before the connection times out. If not set, the default value of the AWS SDK is used (30000ms).

apiCallAttemptTimeoutMs.title: API Call Attempt Timeout (ms)
apiCallAttemptTimeoutMs.description: The amount of time to wait (in milliseconds) for a single HTTP attempt to complete before giving up. If not set, the default value of the AWS SDK is used (disabled).

apiCallTimeoutMs.title: API Call Timeout (ms)
apiCallTimeoutMs.description: The total amount of time (in milliseconds) for the client to complete the execution of an API call, including all retries. If not set, the default value of the AWS SDK is used (disabled).

ssl.title: SSL / TLS Configuration
ssl.description: Custom SSL/TLS trust configuration for the AWS SDK HTTP clients. When not configured, the JVM default truststore is used.

trustAll.title: Trust All Certificates
trustAll.description: Skip certificate validation entirely. Use only for debugging purposes.

trustStoreType.title: Truststore Type
trustStoreType.description: Type of the truststore (JKS, PKCS12, or PEM).

trustStorePath.title: Truststore Path
trustStorePath.description: File path to the truststore on the gateway filesystem.

trustStorePassword.title: Truststore Password
trustStorePassword.description: Password for the truststore (not applicable for PEM).

trustStoreContent.title: Truststore PEM Content
trustStoreContent.description: Inline PEM-encoded certificate(s). Alternative to trustStorePath when using PEM type.
